sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79269" key="parekdi/dwmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρεκ-δίδωμι</orth>, <sense id="n79269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give in marriage secretly</tr_> : <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Παρεκδιδομένη</foreign>, name of a play by Antiphanes.</sense> </entryFree>
